title: Every Room, Photographed. See a Real Report.
tagline: Survey reports now include a room-level photo for every space. Browse a real 19-page AI output — unedited.
summary: Survey reports now include a timestamped room-level photo for every space captured during the walkthrough. Browse a real residential survey — 13 rooms, 126 items, 111 cartons, AI flags, and room notes. Redacted for privacy, unmodified otherwise.

title: Custom Questionnaire
tagline: Capture customer context before the AI even starts.
summary: Let movers configure general or move-type-specific pre-survey questions with branching logic. Customer answers flow into the AI pipeline, flag special items early, and surface in the review dashboard.

title: Voice Notes with Auto Exclude
tagline: "This bookshelf stays." The AI listens, understands, and excludes it automatically.
summary: During the video walkthrough, customers speak naturally about what stays and what goes. The AI transcribes, classifies, and auto-excludes items from the inventory — saving reps significant review time.

title: Interactive AI Move Summary
tagline: From raw inventory to crew plans and truck counts — recalculated live as you edit.
summary: The AI generates a complete move playbook — crew size scenarios, truck counts, packing hours, risk flags, and estimator tips. Edit the inventory and hit Recalculate to see updated estimates instantly.
